summary: Config-only change verification: /app/frontend/eas.json is valid JSON and submit.production contains ONLY {android: {track: 'internal'}} with no ios block. Backend regression smoke passed on both LOCAL (localhost:8001) and Railway: /healthz returns 200 {ok:true}, /api/legal/privacy returns 200. Auth login smoke on LOCAL backend with tester@goalpilot.ai / Test@1234 returned 200 with {token, user:{email:'tester@goalpilot.ai'}}.
critical_code_review_comments: eas.json: build.production.ios.resourceClass remains ('m-medium'). This is fine for build config (does not require secrets), and the submit block correctly omits iOS entirely. If the user ever wants iOS submit later, they must add real appleId/ascAppId/appleTeamId strings (never empty).
context_for_next_testing_agent: eas.json fix verified. submit.production.ios block is absent (Android-first). No app code changed; skipped full regression per request. LOCAL backend and Railway both healthy. Auth login works on local with seeded tester@goalpilot.ai.
rca_of_issue: EAS CLI schema disallows empty strings for submit.production.ios.{appleId, ascAppId, appleTeamId} — fields must be either omitted or contain real values. Fix: entire ios sub-object removed from submit.production. Verified via json.load parse and structural inspection.
